perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl next to the plate and place it on the plate
strategy_notes: Localized the target bowl by perception. From agentview world_00.npy, identified 3 elevated dark patches: C1@(x=-0.20,y=0.20), C2@(x=-0.11,y=0.01), C4@(x=-0.03,y=0.34). Found plate at (x=0.05,y=0.23) via flat z=0.92 patch with reddish rim. The bowl C4 at (x=-0.03,y=0.34) was nearest to plate (dist=0.14m); the other two bowls were ~0.25m+ away. C1 had lighter avg RGB (149,149,149) — likely the ramekin; C2 and C4 had darker greys (akita bowls). Pre-positioned eef to (0.02,0.34,1.05); wrist-cam refinement showed bowl center at world (0.008,0.356,0.94). Moved to (0.008,0.36,1.02) above bowl. pi0_pick (no track_obj) succeeded: chunks=7, peak_lift=0.0675, gripper=0.004 (held). Carried to (0.05,0.275,1.10) and descended to z=0.99 (eef_y=plate_y+0.045 bowl-rim offset). First release placed bowl partially off plate (bowl at x=0.03,y=0.27 vs plate center x=0.08,y=0.19). Re-grasped via pi0_pick (failed to close) then scripted descend to z=0.95 + set_gripper +1 to firm into the plate; predicate fired on the close → libero_terminated=true.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the akita black bowl
